content.content: Create a new github repository named new_project, and invite all collaborators in emmajohnson/image_transformation as the collaborators.

<function_thought>
To fulfill the user's request to create a new GitHub repository and invite all collaborators from an existing repository, I will first create the new repository named "new_project". Once that is done, I will retrieve the information about the collaborators from the "emmajohnson/image_transformation" repository so I can invite them to the new repository.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_create_repo(repo_name="new_project")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Please verify your account to proceed the repository creation. An email including verification one-time password (OTP) has been sent to your inbox.
